title: find_free_id starts from 1 without explaining why 0 is excluded
description: for n in 1u16..=u16::MAX skips ID 0 with no comment. The reason (0 is WH_KEYID_ERASED / the sentinel 'no ID' value in wolfHSM headers) is not captured. A contributor might 'fix' the range to 0..=u16::MAX, breaking the invariant. Fix: add a comment citing WH_KEYID_ERASED from wolfhsm/wh_keyid.h.
